summary: The reproduction confirms that CORS is configured with wildcard origin and credentials enabled, violating CORS security model.
expected_security_impact: CORS preflight should reveal wildcard origin (*) with credentials allowed, enabling cross-site request forgery.
actual_observed_result: CORS response includes Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true, violating browser CORS security model and enabling cross-site authenticated requests.
verification_method: Sent CORS preflight request with malicious origin, checked response headers for wildcard origin and credentials flag.
evidence_produced_by_run: CORS security model violated - wildcard with credentials
Any website can make authenticated requests

reproduction.source_acquisition: Clones from GitHub, builds and runs container
